qids.subject: Databases
qids.prose: Given the relations employee (name, salary, dept-no), and department (dept-no, dept-name,address), Which of the following queries cannot be expressed using the basic relational algebra operations ? A. Department address of every employee B. Employees whose name is the same as their department name
